features.notes: EsmFold and Bio | EsmFold panel are both defined inline in PackageFunctions in src/package.ts; esmfoldPython is a server script under scripts/ (not in files.src).
package.ts registers DiffDock, Biology | DiffDock panel, diffDockModelScript and getTargetFiles; diffdock-model.ts provides DiffDockModel class with poses calculation and viewer composition.
MolMIMModel wrapper is defined inline in PackageFunctions in src/package.ts; MolMIMGenerate is a server script under scripts/ (not in files.src).
